name: dev.inkrun/inkrun-mcp-server
description: Themed Markdown-to-PDF rendering plus grounded PDF data extraction (free inspect, presets or JSON Schema, tables, opt-in OCR), one-call extract-and-regenerate round trips, and AcroForm filling from Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP clients. Cloud-hosted; OAuth 2.1 or API-key auth.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Inkrun API key sent as a bearer token, e.g. 'Bearer sk_...'. Create one in the dashboard under API & MCP (https://inkrun.dev/api-mcp).
